realistic_test_cases.title: Boiler house exterior with visible insulation gaps
Compressed air line with visible leak point
Meter photo with clear digital display
Flare stack video with visible flaring

failure_cases.title: Estimating pipe internal wall thickness from an exterior photo
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: agent declines to estimate; flags that internal condition cannot be assessed from the image

failure_cases.title: Assigning a temperature figure with no visible gauge
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: no numeric figure produced; confidence low; next_action recommends a thermal reading device

failure_cases.title: Photo includes a worker's face clearly visible
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: pii_detected: true, pii_types includes face, redaction flagged before any public use
